name: Hakan's War Manager
short_description: Manage your commanders like a sports team. Scout & train your commanders, set tactics, and outsmart rivals to become champion of the War League. It's like Football Manager, but with armies!
detailed_description:
"Manage your commanders in a simple manager simulation game. "


We're big fans of the Kingdom manga and we wanted to bring that intense tactical battle spirit into our game, where players can outsmart the opponent just like the tacticians in the series. Also, we're taking big inspiration from the from Championship Manager 03/04. Our goal is to create a tactical battles in a manager simulation setting.


  • Prepare Your Strategy: Plan your tactics and formations before each battle in the War League.
  • Manage Your Army: Scout for new recruits, train your commanders, and manage resources to strengthen your army.
  • Engage in Battles: Command your commanders in tactical battles against other clans. Use your strategic skills to outmaneuver and defeat opponents.
  • Progress in the League: Compete in the league to climb the ranks and ultimately become the champion tactician of ancient warfare.
